title: MakeMegasGreatAgain
body:
Ever think that some Mega Evolutions are too weak. Well, this datapack fixes it by buffing them.

This is an addon for Cobblemon and Mega Showdown

Required mods: 

- Cobblemon(https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) >= 1.6.1
- Mega Showdown(https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) >= 9.0.0

To change between forms, right click Pokemon with a empty Mega Stone (I will change this to their own Mega Stones later).

# Changes so far
### Mega Garchomp 
Gained 40 pts of Atk, 40 pts of Spd and 10 in each Defences compare to regular Garchomp, so no more minus 10 Speed.
### Mega Gyarados
The 10 wasted stat points on SpA have been transfered to Spd.
### Mega Alakazam
Gain the Fairy typing after Mega evolved.
